nodes.label: course_admins
nodes.note: Settings-panel PIN read/update fails — table is deny-all RLS and the panel writes it directly. Move PIN read/update into an edge function.

nodes.label: user_profiles
nodes.note: RLS still allow-all: anyone with the public key can read PII (email/phone/dob) and edit any row. Enforcing policies drafted; cutover pending.

nodes.label: line-auth-session
nodes.note: LIFF in-app session creation (v2 magic-link) deployed 2026-06-13; pending real in-app device verification before the RLS cutover.

nodes.label: chat_messages
nodes.note: RLS lockdown deferred — chat write-path writes auth.uid() which != profile_id; needs client fix + a membership helper before securing.

nodes.label: chat_room_members
nodes.note: Self-referential membership needs a SECURITY DEFINER helper before RLS can be enforced (recursion risk).

nodes.label: chat_rooms
nodes.note: Same chat write-path / membership issue as chat_messages — RLS deferred.

nodes.label: mint-supabase-jwt
nodes.note: DEAD approach (self-minted JWT, required a private key Supabase won't hand over). Superseded by line-oauth-exchange + the custom access token hook. Safe to delete.
